title: Beehiiv vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Omnisend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
intro: Beehiiv and Omnisend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators and publishers with monetization features, while Omnisend specializes in e-commerce with integrated SMS and omnichannel automation. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your specific needs.

comparison_table.tool_b: Omnichannel automation with SMS and push

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter publisher or content creator looking to monetize your audience
You want access to an ad network and referral program built into your email platform
You prefer a larger free tier with up to 2,500 subscribers
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business and need email combined with SMS marketing
You want omnichannel automation including push notifications and pre-built workflows
You need a more affordable entry point with plans starting at $16/month

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with monetization features, while Omnisend is superior for e-commerce businesses needing integrated SMS and omnichannel capabilities. Choose based on whether you prioritize newsletter growth or multi-channel customer communication.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend offers lower paid pricing at $16/month versus Beehiiv's $39/month starting price. However, Beehiiv's free tier supports 2,500 subscribers compared to Omnisend's 250, making Beehiiv better value if you don't need paid features immediately.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export, allowing you to migrate your subscriber lists and campaign history. The migration process typically involves exporting your contacts as CSV from Omnisend and importing them into Beehiiv, though some custom configurations may need manual setup.
